title: Shani Dev Mantra
intro: Read the Shani Dev Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Shani Dev.
description:
Main Mantra

"Om Sham Shanaishcharaya Namah."

English Meaning

I bow to Lord Shani (Shanaishchara), the slow-moving divine deity.
This mantra is chanted to seek Lord Shani's blessings, protection, wisdom, patience, and balance in life.

faq.q1: When should Shani Dev Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Shani Dev Mantra is considered especially auspicious when chanted on Saturdays, in the morning, or after sunset.
faq.q2: How many times should Shani Dev Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Shani Dev Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Shani Dev Mantra is believed to bring patience, positive energy, and the blessings of Lord Shani.
faq.q4: Is Saturday the best day to chant Shani Dev Mantra?
faq.a4: Yes, Saturday is regarded as the most auspicious day for chanting Shani Dev Mantra.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Shani Dev Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Shani Dev Mantra with faith and devotion.
